parameters.content:
## 🤖 L2LAAF Orchestrator
**Phase:** 43.1.35
**Commit:** 43.1.35 - CHORE(testing): Reset environment for fresh end-to-end Live UI Mutation test execution

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ { "cardsV2": [ { "cardId": "l2laaf_error_gate", "card": { "header": { "title": "🚨 n8n Workflow Error", "subtitle": "L2LAAF Autonomous Orchestrator" }, "sections": [{ "widgets": [ { "textParagraph": { "text": "Failing Node:
" + $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted + "

Error Message:
" + $json.execution.error.message } } ] }] } } ] } }}

={{ { "cardsV2": [ { "cardId": "l2laaf_blocked_gate", "card": { "header": { "title": "⛔ L2LAAF Deployment BLOCKED: Phase " + $json.updated_state.current_phase }, "sections": [{ "widgets": [ { "textParagraph": { "text": "Originator:
" + ($json.meta.method || "UNKNOWN") + "

Status:
" + ($json.system_status === "GREEN" ? "🟢 " : ($json.system_status === "YELLOW" ? "🟡 " : "🔴 ")) + $json.system_status + "

Intent:
" + $json.intent } }, { "decoratedText": { "topLabel": "Reason", "text": $json.throttle_message, "wrapText": true } }, { "decoratedText": { "topLabel": "Blocked Payload", "text": $json.meta.summary, "wrapText": true } } ] }] } } ] } }}

={{ { "cardsV2": [ { "cardId": "l2laaf_deploy_gate", "card": { "header": { "title": "🚀 L2LAAF Deployment: Phase " + $json.updated_state.current_phase }, "sections": [{ "widgets": [ { "textParagraph": { "text": "Originator:
" + ($json.meta.method || "UNKNOWN") + "

Status:
" + ($json.system_status === "GREEN" ? "🟢 " : ($json.system_status === "YELLOW" ? "🟡 " : "🔴 ")) + $json.system_status + "

Intent:
" + $json.intent } }, { "decoratedText": { "topLabel": "Build Details", "text": $json.meta.summary, "wrapText": true } }, { "decoratedText": { "topLabel": "Throttle Evaluation", "text": $json.throttle_message, "wrapText": true } }, { "buttonList": { "buttons": [{ "text": "PROMOTE TO PROD", "onClick": { "openLink": { "url": "https://local2local.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/ea64f359-a428-46e4-9dc1-d5c643f385eb?action=approve&env=" + $json.updated_state.active_environment + "&build_id=" + ($json.meta.build_id || $json.meta.correlation_id || "unknown") + "&phase=" + $json.updated_state.current_phase + "&hbrId=" + ($json.meta.hbrId || $json.meta.payload?.manifest?.hbrId || "manual") } } }, { "text": "KEEP IN DEV", "onClick": { "openLink": { "url": "https://local2local.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/ea64f359-a428-46e4-9dc1-d5c643f385eb?action=decline&env=" + $json.updated_state.active_environment + "&build_id=" + ($json.meta.build_id || $json.meta.correlation_id || "unknown") + "&phase=" + $json.updated_state.current_phase + "&hbrId=" + ($json.meta.hbrId || $json.meta.payload?.manifest?.hbrId || "manual") } } }] } }] }] } } ] } }}

={{ { "resourceNames": [ "projects/" + ($('Approval Listener').first().json.query.env === 'prod' ? 'local2local-prod' : 'local2local-dev') ], "filter": "textPayload:\"Null check operator used on a null value\"", "pageSize": 10 } }}

={{ { "systemInstruction": { "parts": [ { "text": "You are the L2LAAF Autonomous Orchestrator. Fix the provided code based on the error or request. Return ONLY the raw code. NO markdown formatting, NO backticks, NO explanations." } ] }, "contents": [ { "parts": [ { "text": "File Path: " + $json.filePath + "

Reason: " + $json.reason + "

Code:
" + $json.fileContent } ] } ] } }}

={{ Object.assign({ message: $('Prepare Mutate Payload').first().json.commitMessage, content: $('Prepare Mutate Payload').first().json.encodedContent, branch: 'develop' }, $('Get Logic SHA').first().json.sha ? { sha: $('Get Logic SHA').first().json.sha } : {}) }}

={{ Object.assign({ message: $('Prepare State Payload').first().json.commitMessage, content: $('Prepare State Payload').first().json.encodedContent, branch: 'develop' }, $('Get State SHA').first().json.sha ? { sha: $('Get State SHA').first().json.sha } : {}) }}

={{ { "text": $('Automated Testing Suite').first().json.action === 'decline' ? "🗃️ Phase " + $('Automated Testing Suite').first().json.updated_state.current_phase + " kept in dev. This change remains in git history and can be cherry-picked into a future version. To view all abandoned versions, check Firestore collection `artifacts/system_status/public/data/abandoned_phases` in the local2local-dev GCP project. This can be viewed in the SuperAdmin dashboard in the dev environment." : "✅ Phase " + $('Automated Testing Suite').first().json.updated_state.current_phase + " promoted to prod. This merged the tested 'develop' branch to the 'main' branch and deployed to local2local-prod." } }}

headers.user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 18_7 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/26.4 Mobile/15E148 Safari/604.1
